name: @pascal-app/relay
description: y-websocket relay for Pascal — routes CRDT messages between browsers and MCP plugin instances. Stateless: it does not see the world data.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --packages=external --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
